title: cogswellia orientalis
intro: Cogswellia orientalis, also known as Prickly Poppy or Chinese Prickly Poppy, is a flowering plant native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cogswellia orientalis include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Cogswellia orientalis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made from the plant's flowers, leaves, and roots.
